description: DeepInfra provides hosted inference for open-source AI models, including LLMs, embeddings, image generation, speech, and other model types. It also offers APIs for batch processing and deploying private or dedicated models.
summary: DeepInfra exposes three documented developer-facing HTTP APIs: an OpenAI-compatible API, a native inference API, and an Anthropic-compatible Messages API; all require a DeepInfra-issued token, with scoped JWTs also supported for inference access.
